monthly_200ema.interpretation: Long-term uptrend (16+ years) intact. 200-month EMA acting as dynamic support. Macro bull market for MSTR as BTC treasury proxy has NOT been broken. Corrections staying above this line are healthy shakeouts, not trend reversals.

weekly_200ema.interpretation: Classic mid-cycle correction after parabolic run. 2024-2025 bull leg pushed MSTR to $457-$543 ATH. 2025-2026 correction took it down ~60-70% to ~$139 consolidation. Price below 200W EMA but heading toward it = correction is maturing.

ema_analysis.combined_signal: TEXTBOOK CYCLE-LOW SETUP. Monthly above 200 EMA = long-term bull intact with macro tailwinds. Weekly below 200 EMA but approaching = intermediate correction nearing exhaustion. This is GREEN LIGHT confirmation for the cycle-low LEAP moonshot entry.
ema_analysis.strategy_alignment: This is NOT a broken trend. NOT chasing a top. Waiting for the exact compression/recovery inflection where deep OTM calls are cheapest and have maximum convexity.

entry_signals_to_watch.weekly_200ema_reclaim: When price reclaims weekly 200 EMA (~$150-$180) with volume + green weeks + premium <= 1.5x = confluence entry signal (thick white line crossover + filters)
entry_signals_to_watch.btc_stabilization: BTC needs to stabilize/turn up from $45-$50k bottom for cycle confirmation
entry_signals_to_watch.premium_compression: MSTR premium stays compressed near 1x NAV = ideal entry zone

risk_assessment: This is precisely the prelude to the kind of move the $130k lottery ticket strategy is designed for. The chart shows the exact environment where deep OTM LEAPs have maximum convexity. Not fighting the tape — aligned with the macro cycle.
